name: documentation
description: Generate or update documentation for a module

team.name: documenter
team.role: Technical writer — produces clear, accurate, well-structured documentation

team.name: doc-reviewer
team.role: Documentation reviewer — checks accuracy, completeness, and clarity

tasks.title: Analyze and document {{module}}
tasks.description:
Analyze {{module}} and write {{style}} documentation.

Output: {{output}}

For reference docs: document all public exports, interfaces, functions, parameters, return types, and usage examples.
For tutorial docs: write a step-by-step guide with working code examples.
For guide docs: explain architecture, design decisions, and how things connect.
For changelog docs: summarize recent changes with migration notes.

Base documentation on actual code — do not hallucinate APIs.

tasks.title: Review documentation
tasks.description:
Review the documentation at {{output}} for {{module}}:
1. Verify all code examples are correct and would compile/run
2. Check that all public APIs are documented
3. Verify accuracy against actual source code
4. Check for clarity, completeness, and consistency
5. Fix any issues found directly in the documentation

expectations.criteria: Documentation is accurate, complete, well-structured, and all code examples are correct
